creator: ernie@eis.net.au
text:
After recompiling the 2.2.6 kernel source with the following line for 
stallion Easyio card

device          stl0    at isa? port 0x2a0 tty irq 5 vector stlintr

The kernel probes reported not card found at 0x2a0

Fix: 

Download stalbsd-current.tar.gz from ftp.stallion.com and install.

In other words the drivers that worked with 2.2.5-RELEASE no longer do
with 2.2.6-RELEASE and should be updated.
How-To-Repeat: Compile 2.2.6 kernel with stallion support and reboot with the
appropriate Stallion card present.
